full_text:
Zao Zhi 棗祗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zao Zhi (棗祗)was born in Yingchuan. Held out against Lü Bu and kept supplies going. His idea of agricultural colonies was credited with Wei’s success. Zao Zhi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
